rules.warning: NEVER engage phantom power with a ribbon microphone connected. This can permanently damage the ribbon element. Phantom power (48V) should only be used with condenser microphones.
That microphone is too heavy for a lightweight stand. It can tip over and damage the mic (replacement cost: $3,000+). Please use the heavy tripod stand in the corner by the door.
Wrapping cables tightly around stands or boom arms can kink and damage the internal wiring. Best practice: coil cables loosely in loops and secure with a velcro strap.
Plugging or unplugging XLR cables while the preamp gain is up can cause loud pops that damage speakers. Turn down the gain and monitor volume before connecting or disconnecting cables.
